title: Slender The Haunted Forest
description: This mod adds in the Slenderman game into Minecraft
body:
## Watch the Trailer!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DZIMfC8fymQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### REQUIRES GECKOLIB

**To play this you must select the slenderman gamemode from the gamerule menu before creating the world!**

This mod adds in the Slender the Eight Pages game into Minecraft. This is not your standard Minecraft mod. This mod adds in a Slender gamemode that is completely seperate from the standard Minecraft experience.

To play Slenderman in Minecraft you must create a new world and go into the gamerule options and turn on the slenderman gamemode option. Then you can simply create the world and the mod will do the rest!

You will be brought into the slenderman game. Your goal is to collect 8 pages. Right click on a page to collect it. Pages are located on the various structures that would be seen in the Slender game. Pages do not respawn so **creating a brand new world on death is recommended** (otherwise you will have to travel really far to find any pages).

Upon collecting the first page Slenderman will now be active. Do not look at Slenderman for too long or get too close, because otherwise you will meet your fate. Every time you collect a page, Slenderman will become more aggressive and harder to avoid.

Upon collecting the 8th page you will win the game and be transported into the vanilla Minecraft world, having escaped Slenderman's game.

Have fun and let me know if you find any bugs!

**NOTE: At this current point in time upon being transported back into the vanilla world, you will hear slenderman's sound being played every second for about 30 seconds until it stops. This may lead to your game crashing. If it does then just join back into the world and it should be fine. (This will try to be fixed)**

## Check out How I Made the Mod!
